testcase.name: formTest

failure.message:
element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (382, 600). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.159) Build info: version: '4.35.0', revision: '1c58e5028b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '24.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [7da3150219bc304a434871ee4864ac5c, clickElement {id=f.8C040D8CA4355BB9C78C570E110AD9AA.d.7D96820568C5553E681F24BFBBACD47B.e.8}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.159, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\vasylec\AppData\Lo...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62744}, goog:processID: 19284, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62744/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.159, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (7da3150219bc304a434871ee4864ac5c)] -> xpath: //*[text()='Forms']] Session ID: 7da3150219bc304a434871ee4864ac5c

SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. mar. 04, 2026 8:59:44 A.M. org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 mar. 04, 2026 8:59:44 A.M. org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.159. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.35.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
